name: Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd.
description: Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd. is a high-grade underground gold producer with two Canadian mines: the Eagle River mine in Wawa, Ontario, and the Kiena mine in Val-d'Or, Quebec. The company delivered record 2025 revenue of $914 million, a 64% increase year-over-year, and expects 180,000 to 205,000 ounces of gold production in 2026. Wesdome is executing a fill-the-mill strategy at both operations and expanding its exploration pipeline to grow reserves and replace mined ounces.
